Off Calendar Nov-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT SAINT FRANCIS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Joseph Russell Hughes To Respond To Form Interrogatories (Set One), Special Interrogatories (Set One), And Request For Production Of Documents (Set One), And To Have Matters Specified In Requests For Admission (Set One) Deemed Admitted is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert F. Kane; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)
